Reviews.Author: 1y05jymm4n
Reviews.Comment:
Quick Madium Review (by Manager | Support Manager)
Madium is currently the best free and keyless executor I’ve tested.

Pros:
* Extremely fast injection and smooth script execution
* Outstanding performance in stress tests (avg 5.33 million iterations/sec)
* Passed all 6 stress stages with strong consistency
* Fibonacci F(10,000) in 3.18 seconds
* 100% functions (55/55) and 93% security

Cons:

* The UI looks very basic and AI-generated. Not great visually.

Final Verdict: 4.6/10
If you want top performance and don’t care about a fancy interface, Madium is the best free option right now. Highly recommended for users who prioritize speed and reliability.

Reviews.Author: 17lu0erh32
Reviews.Comment: It's really irritating to see the state madium is in right now, because in my opinion, it was perfect on version 1.0.7. For now, Madium serves as a decent alternative to Velocity, but lacks stability and quality updates. This might be a hot take, but Madium RIGHT NOW is comparable to Yub-X at the time I'm making this review. also raknet's coming in like 2030 💔

Categories.Comment: Their script support is very good, but high sUNC isn't very rare nowadays.  There's not much else to it
I've never seen any FPS drops or abnormal CPU or memory usage, so I'll have to give it a 4/5 only because of the lag spike on injection.

This is my main issue with Madium. Before they migrated to the bootsrapper, it was perfectly stable with essentially no crashes, but ever since then, the stability has been absolute dogshit. In most cases, you can't even join the game anymore, and when you do, you're either met with a false crash log, fake injection, or a crash on injection. It's very irritating to try to work around, even if you go through the support docs.
I mean, it's okay, I guess. All they have is a color scheme change at the moment, but I'm sure they'll let us customize our UIs and maybe more...
Don't get me wrong, their update frequency is very high, but the quality of them isn't good anymore.
